title: CMD.BSP.004.ENV.CLOSE_PERIOD — Close the active period budget
description: Payload of the CLOSE_PERIOD command. Issued by POL.BSP.004.ENV.ON_PERIOD_END_DUE (placeholder time-based policy). Handled by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET. For each envelope whose consumed_amount is at or below `unconsumed_threshold * cap_amount`, emits one RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_PERIOD_WITHOUT_CONSUMPTION (the counter-intuitive relapse signal). Period transitions to CLOSED. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream timer / period-due event.

kind.description: Discriminator. Reserved for future trigger kinds.

closing_at.description: Timestamp at which closure is being applied. Must be at or after the period_end of the period budget.

unconsumed_threshold.description: Fraction of cap_amount below which an envelope is considered UNCONSUMED at closure. Default 0.05 (5%). Captured as a parameter so the product/regulatory policy can evolve without changing the contract.
